title: Sick-Day Smoky Irish Wood Ear Mushrooms Stir-fry
description: A whole30-friendly sick-day dish featuring smoky wood ear mushrooms in a creamy sauce.
instructions: Preheat your broiler. Rinse wood ear mushrooms and pat dry.

In a medium saucepan, combine cream, garlic, heavy whipping cream, heavy sour cream, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper. Stir to mix well. Bring to a simmer over medium heat until the mixture thickens slightly, about 5 minutes.
Add butter to the saucepan with mushrooms. Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Pour the creamy sauce over the mushrooms, ensuring they're evenly coated. Broil for another 2-3 minutes until the mushroom caps are golden and crispy.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
